title: Spreadsheets, Python, Reproducibility, and Calculation Checks
description: Turn a hand calculation into a reusable, tested worksheet and small Python model. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible calculation tool with test cases through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use relative and absolute cell references intentionally in copied formulas.
Add input constraints, units, labels, and audit cells to a spreadsheet model.
Express a unit-aware calculation as readable Python variables, functions, and output.
